extDescription.message: Earn Robux cashback on every single purchase on Roblox!

successPopupMessage.message: You have successfully acquired the $1 for $2.

successPopupCashback.message: $1 has been added to your RoEarn balance.

tooltipRobloxLimited.message: Limiteds created by Roblox are not eligible for cashback.

tooltipNotInGame.message: This item is not eligible because it cannot be purchased in-game.

tooltipPriceTooLow.message: This item's price is too low to receive cashback. Minimum price for cashback is $1 Robux.

tooltipGamepassMinPrice.message: Gamepass price must be higher than 40 Robux to be eligible for cashback.

tooltipGamepassMinPriceShort.message: Gamepass price must be higher than 40 Robux to be eligible for cashback.

errorDiscordSupport.message: Error $1: Please join our Discord support server: discord.gg/roearnsupport

reviewPromptText.message: Did RoEarn work for you? Give us a review!

checkoutSubtitle.message: Get cashback on your Roblox purchase

checkoutStep1.message: Join the RoEarn hub using the play button below.

checkoutStep2.message: You will be prompted to purchase $1 inside the game.

checkoutStep3.message: Your $1 cashback will be instantly credited to your RoEarn balance for withdrawal.

welcomeSubtitle.message: Here's a quick tutorial video to help you get started

referralEntryTitle.message: Did someone invite you to RoEarn?

referralEntryDescription.message: Enter their code below and you'll both get extra cashback!

errorOwnReferralCode.message: You cannot use your own invite code

errorReferralAlreadyUsed.message: You have already used an invite code.

errorInvalidReferralCodeRetry.message: Invalid code. Please check and try again.

bonusAddedText.message: 5 Robux has been added to your RoEarn balance!

errorMinWithdrawal.message: The minimum withdrawal amount is 4 Robux.

withdrawalSuccessMessage.message: Please check your Pending Robux and Sale of Goods in about 45 seconds, as the purchase may take a moment to appear.

referralDescription.message:
Share your invite code. When someone installs RoEarn using your code, you earn 15 Robux instantly!

Anyone who uses your invite code will get 5 Robux!

⚠️ Disclaimer: No alternative accounts will receive the Robux reward.

noReferralsMessage.message: No invites yet. Share your code to start earning!

errorAuthFailed.message: Failed to authenticate. Please make sure you are logged in to Roblox.

errorAuthRetry.message: Failed to authenticate. Please try again.

errorFetchGames.message: Failed to fetch your games. Please make sure you have at least one game created.

errorFetchGamesRetry.message: Failed to fetch your games. Please try again.

errorNoGames.message: You need to create a Roblox game first before you can use a referral code. Please create a game and try again.

errorSecurityToken.message: Failed to get security token. Please refresh the page and try again.

errorCreateGamepass.message: Failed to create verification gamepass. Please try again.

errorUpdateGamepass.message: Failed to update gamepass details. Please try again.

errorFetchGamepasses.message: Failed to fetch existing gamepasses. Please try again.

errorNoGamepasses.message: No gamepasses available to use for verification. Please try again.

errorUpdateVerification.message: Failed to update gamepass for verification. Please try again.

errorUnexpected.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

checkoutBulkStep2.message: You will be prompted to purchase your items inside the game.

checkoutBulkStep2Single.message: You will be prompted to purchase your item inside the game.

somethingWentWrong.message: Please try your withdrawal again in 5 minutes.

pendingRobuxNotice.message: You have X Robux pending. Check back in 2 minutes.

tooltipOffSale.message: This item is not eligible for cashback because the original is currently unavailable for purchase.

contentCreatorPayout.message: Get paid 300 Robux per 1,000 views for YouTube Shorts

contentCreatorDescription.message: The video must show the RoEarn extension and its catalog cashback feature. Please make sure your Roblox username is in the description.

contentCreatorContact.message: Contact creators@roearn.io to claim your Robux

contentCreatorLink.message: Long-form videos are paid |SPLIT| per 1,000 views

withdrawalAgreementText.message: We will pay you the Robux by buying your gamepass. RoEarn automatically creates the gamepass for you, so you don't need to do anything.

notificationText.message: Robux added to your RoEarn balance. You can now withdraw it!

shareYourInvite.message: 🎉 Share your invite code and earn $1 Robux for every friend you bring to RoEarn.
shareYourInvite.description: Referral prompt text with invite bonus amount

sponsoredPlacements_Text.message: The games in this section are promoted through RoEarn as part of sponsored placements.

tutorialStep1Body_Text.message: RoEarn pays you 5 Robux for every hour you spend in sponsored games. Just play, earn, and withdraw whenever you want.

tutorialStep2Body_Text.message: This panel shows your time played and Robux earned. You earn 5 Robux per hour — that's 1 Robux every 12 minutes, added directly to your RoEarn balance.

shareTextX.message:
Just found out you can get Robux cashback when buying things on Roblox using RoEarn. If you try it, invite code $1 gives 5 Robux.

Get it here: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/roearn-cashback-on-roblox/fooenmopnfaejehogdbmegaleanpdcea?utm_campaign=x

#Robux #Roblox #RoEarn #RobloxDev

shareTextTelegram.message: Just found out you can get Robux cashback when buying things on Roblox using RoEarn. If you try it, invite code $1 gives 5 Robux.

shareTextReddit.message: Get Robux cashback on Roblox purchases using RoEarn (invite code $1 gives 5 Robux)

dashboard_fav_desc.message: Earn Robux by automatically favoriting clothing items in the background

dashboard_fav_bubble_body.message: This will automatically favorite 2D clothing assets when they release. You earn 1 Robux for every 20 favorites, up to 24 Robux a day in the background — as long as your browser is running. Earnings are added directly to your RoEarn balance.

dashboard_subscribe_desc.message: Stay updated with our latest tips & news

dashboard_roexport_desc.message: Save and re-upload any shirt, pants, or t-shirt on Roblox — including off-sale items. Adds a “Save Template” and “Re-Upload” button on every clothing page across the marketplace, profiles, group stores, and inventory.

dashboard_creator_desc.message: Create videos about RoEarn using Roblox gameplay or footage. Show off the extension, what you earned, or make a tutorial — anything featuring RoEarn and Roblox works.

dashboard_creator_rule1.message: Video must be high quality and well edited

dashboard_creator_rule2.message: RoEarn must be clearly shown and visible to the viewer

dashboard_creator_rule3.message: Your Roblox username must be in the video description

dashboard_submit_desc.message: Email us your video link to receive payment — we may take up to 24 hours to reply

s_fav_lock_body.message: Make 1 purchase using RoEarn to unlock automatic clothing favoriting.

s_invites_empty.message: Start inviting people and they will show up here.

s_referral_disclaimer.message: ⚠️ No alternative accounts will receive the Robux reward.

s_alt_tooltip.message: This account was detected as suspicious and will not receive the Robux reward.

yt_err_missing_fields.message: Please enter a valid YouTube video URL.

yt_err_invalid_url.message: That doesn't look like a valid YouTube link.

yt_err_video_not_found.message: Video not found — make sure it's public.

yt_err_fetch_failed.message: Couldn't reach YouTube right now. Try again.

yt_err_db_error.message: Server error. Please try again shortly.

yt_err_internal_error.message: Something went wrong. Try again later.

yt_err_auth_failed.message: Could not verify your Roblox account.

yt_err_username_not_in_desc.message: Your Roblox username ($1) must be in the video description.

yt_err_insufficient_views.message: Your video needs at least $1 views to qualify (currently $2).

yt_submit_success.message: Video submitted! We'll review it within 24 hours.

yt_tooltip_pending.message: Your video is currently under review. This process can take up to 24 hours.

yt_tooltip_approved.message: This video has been reviewed and the Robux have been paid out.

yt_tooltip_rejected.message: Your video did not follow our creator rules and was not approved for payment.

dashboard_shorts_disclaimer.message: Low-quality posts under 5,000 views will only receive 50 Robux per 1,000 views.

dashboard_submit_agreement_body.message: By submitting a video, you agree that it is related to RoEarn and that RoEarn is shown in the video. Submitting unrelated videos will permanently remove your ability to submit.

dashboard_roregion_description.message: Choose your Roblox server region and connect to locations worldwide — so you always get the best ping and smoothest gameplay. Adds a region selector directly into Roblox, letting you filter servers by location with just a few clicks.

mobileWarningTitle.message: Important: Earn Cash Back on Purchases

mobileWarningBody.message: To earn cash back with RoEarn, you must purchase Roblox catalog items here in your browser — not in the Roblox app. Purchases made inside the Roblox app cannot be tracked, so you won't receive any cash back for them.

shoppingWarningBody.message: This is an avatar shopping game. If you purchase any items inside this game, you will NOT receive cash back through RoEarn — the game owner will receive it instead. To earn cash back, purchase your Roblox catalog items on the Roblox website using RoEarn.

creator_snapshot_title.message: Your views are locked in at submission

creator_snapshot_body1.message: The view count your video has right now is what you'll be paid for — we take a snapshot the moment you submit.

creator_snapshot_body2.message: If you want to wait for more views first, that's totally fine — just come back and submit when you're ready to cash out.

creator_channel_url_error.message: That's a channel URL — please submit a link to the specific video.

creator_guide_title.message: How to Make a High-Quality Video

creator_guide_subtitle.message: Our top 5 creators are earning over 1,000,000 Robux/month — here's what separates a great submission from a rejected one.

creator_guide_good1.message: Roblox gameplay is clearly visible throughout the video

creator_guide_good2.message: Extension name appears as visible on-screen text — not just a logo

creator_guide_good3.message: You explain how to find and install the extension on screen

creator_guide_good4.message: Focused content that viewers can easily follow along with

creator_guide_good5.message: Encourages viewers to comment, like, and engage

creator_guide_good6.message: Strong title, thumbnail, and description for discoverability

creator_guide_bad1.message: Only shows our logo — viewers can't figure out how to install it

creator_guide_bad2.message: Re-uploading the same video multiple times to farm payouts

creator_guide_bad3.message: Low engagement — no comments, few likes, poor watch time

creator_guide_bad4.message: Extension name never shown or mentioned on screen

creator_guide_bad6.message: Feels scripted or spammy with no genuine value for viewers

creator_guide_protip.message: Pro tip: Focus on making one genuinely great video rather than many low-effort ones. A single viral video can earn you far more Robux — our top creators consistently go viral by treating every video like it could be their biggest one yet.

creator_section_desc.message: As a verified creator you can make videos and get paid Robux — submit a video featuring any of our extensions and earn the same way.

creator_primary_ext_desc.message: Your primary extension is RoEarn — these are bonus extensions to diversify your content and earn more.

creator_video_requirement.message: Video requirement: Your video must clearly show the extension in use and display its name on screen so viewers know how to find and install it.

shareTextWhatsApp.message:
Just found out you can get Robux cashback when buying things on Roblox using RoEarn. If you try it, invite code $1 gives 5 Robux.

Get it here: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/roearn-cashback-on-roblox/fooenmopnfaejehogdbmegaleanpdcea?utm_campaign=whatsapp

donate_join_sub.message: Join the game to complete your purchase. Once inside, you'll be prompted to buy this pass.

donate_join_disclaimer.message: Since this is a donation, you will not receive cash back.

donate_empty_sub.message: This player hasn't set up any game passes yet.

donate_notice_text.message: These are game passes owned by this player. Buying one sends Robux directly to their account.

donate_tagline.message: Buy a game pass from @$1 and the Robux goes straight to them.

donate_search_hint.message: Type a username to find a player

donate_friends_login.message: Log in to Roblox to see your friends

donate_friends_empty.message: You don't have any friends yet

donate_search_error.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.

cartLimitTitle.message: Cart limit reached ($1 active items max)

cartLimitBody.message: Roblox only allows $1 items per purchase. You can disable items in your cart to save them for later without removing them.

cartLimitBodyRecheck.message: You can only have $1 active items at once. Disable another item first, or remove it from your cart.

wm_popup_subtitle.message: Every video submission must include it — visible start to finish, no exceptions.

wm_req1.message: Watermark must be visible the entire video — first frame to last.

wm_req2.message: It must be easy to read and see — not hidden, faded out, or cut off the screen.

wm_req3.message: The watermark alone is not a shortcut — your video must also show and explain the extension.

wm_save_desc.message: Save the watermark image and add it to your video using any editor.

wm_intro_subtitle.message: We now require a watermark in every video submission. Here's everything you need to know.

wm_intro_req1.message: Include the RoEarn watermark in every video you submit.

wm_intro_req2.message: It must be visible the entire video — from the first frame to the last, easy to see and read.

wm_intro_rejected.message: Videos submitted without the watermark will now be rejected.

wm_rejection_body.message: This means your submission didn't meet our quality standards or watermark requirements. Please review the rules before submitting again — following them carefully is the best way to get approved.

wm_tooltip_watermark_rule.message: Watermark must be visible throughout the entire video

wm_disclaimer.message: Low-quality shorts with less than 5,000 views will only receive 50 Robux per 1,000 views.

wm_watermark_notice.message: Does your video include the RoEarn watermark? If not, it will be rejected.

creator_rule1.message: Your video must be Roblox related — content unrelated to Roblox will not be accepted.

creator_rule2.message: Your video must be high quality and well edited — put effort into your content.

creator_rule3.message: RoEarn must be clearly shown in your video — viewers should be able to see and understand what it is.

creator_rule4.message: The RoEarn watermark must be in your video from start to finish — it needs to stay on screen the entire time.

submit_err_missing_fields.message: Please paste a video URL first.

submit_err_not_a_video_url.message: That doesn't look like a YouTube or TikTok link. Make sure it's a video URL.

submit_err_youtube_channel_url.message: That looks like a YouTube channel link, not a video. Paste a link to a specific video (e.g. youtube.com/watch?v=...).

submit_err_tiktok_profile_url.message: That looks like a TikTok profile link, not a video. Paste a link to a specific video (e.g. tiktok.com/@user/video/...).

submit_err_tiktok_no_video_id.message: Couldn't find the video or photo in that TikTok link. Paste a link to a specific video or photo post (e.g. tiktok.com/@user/video/... or tiktok.com/@user/photo/...).

submit_err_invalid_url_yt.message: That doesn't look like a valid YouTube video URL.

submit_err_invalid_url_tt.message: That doesn't look like a valid TikTok video URL.

submit_err_video_not_found_yt.message: That YouTube video wasn't found. Make sure it's public and the URL is correct.

submit_err_video_not_found_tt.message: That TikTok video wasn't found. Make sure it's public and the URL is correct.

submit_err_yt_fetch_failed.message: Couldn't load that YouTube video right now. Try again in a moment.

submit_err_tt_fetch_failed.message: Couldn't load that TikTok video right now. Try again in a moment.

submit_err_username_not_in_desc_yt.message: Your Roblox username ($1) must appear in the YouTube video title or description.

submit_err_username_not_in_desc_tt.message: Your Roblox username ($1) must appear in the TikTok title. (Edit your post to have your username in the title)

submit_err_username_not_in_desc.message: Your Roblox username must appear in the video.

submit_err_insufficient_views.message: Your video needs at least $1 views to qualify. It currently has $2.

submit_err_already_submitted_yt.message: That YouTube video has already been submitted.

submit_err_already_submitted_tt.message: That TikTok video has already been submitted.

submit_err_already_submitted.message: That video has already been submitted.

submit_err_db_error.message: A server error occurred. Please try again.

submit_err_network_error.message: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

submit_err_auth_failed.message: Couldn't verify your Roblox account. Please refresh and try again.

submit_err_default.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.

plus_unsubscribed_title.message: 💰 Double up on every Robux you spend

plus_body_copy.message: Roblox Plus gives you 10–20% off purchases — and RoEarn gives you cashback on top of that. They stack together, so the more you save with Plus, the more cashback you earn with RoEarn.

creator_url_placeholder.message: Paste TikTok or YouTube Video URL..

creator_rule1_full.message: Your video must be focused on Roblox content, such as gameplay, or the Roblox website.

creator_rule2_full.message: Your video must be high quality, well edited, and clear to watch.

creator_rule3_full.message: The RoEarn extension must be clearly shown, used, or talked about in your video.

creator_rule4_full.message: The official RoEarn watermark must stay visible on screen from start to finish.

creator_earn_subtitle_post.message: 300 per 1,000 views on TikTok & YouTube Shorts
